headline: Sharplink Buys $62.4M ETH Amid Crypto Surge

headline: PBOC Holds 2% Overnight Rate in Surprise Move

article.title: PBOC Unexpectedly Withholds Rate on New Overnight Operation
article.summary: China’s central bank held its debut overnight operation but didn’t disclose the rate of interest it charged commercial lenders, in a surprise move to traders awaiting guidance on borrowing costs.

headline: Volatility Plunges 20% on Reduced Market Uncertainty

article.title: Markets Are Buying Into Less Uncertainty: Capital.com
article.summary: Kyle Rodda of Capital.com shares his views on the de-dollarization trade and market volatility. He says it shouldn't be understated "how significant it is that the United States is inviting Iran, effectively, back into global trade, selling its oil into global markets." (Source: Bloomberg)
